κερδαλέος, α, ον (s. κέρδος; Hom. et al.; Artem. 4, 62) profitable, gainful τὸ κ. διώκειν pursue gain 2 Cl 20:4.—DELG s.v. κέρδος.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Artem Artem , onir., II a.d.—List 5

2 Cl 2 Cl = 2 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 541
